title: Clinic discloses client information when trying to collect a debt
summary: An individual complained that her dental clinic disclosed information about her overdue account to the person who had referred her to the clinic. The complainant noted that she had been in hospital and in respite care for several months, and thus did not receive the invoices sent by the dental clinic. When the invoices remained unpaid, th...
dedupKey: clinic discloses client information when trying to collect a debt|2006-05-16
